declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, rollers, a retainer and a loose ring corresponding to 1.18 Kg
note: This EPD uses the bearings PCR module structure (Upstream/Core/Downstream) rather than EN 15804 A1-A3. The production stage equivalent to A1-A3 was taken as Upstream + Core. GWP-fossil = 5.98E+00 + 3.16E+00 = 9.14; GWP-biogenic = -5.17E-02 + 9.76E-04 = -5.07E-02; GWP-total = 5.93E+00 + 3.17E+00 = 9.10. No separate GWP-GHG indicator is given in the results table (only referenced in the data quality table), so gwp_ghg_a1a3 is null. Full cradle-to-grave totals are GWP-fossil 9.16, GWP-total 9.17.
